backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as the backend entry point with no implemented functionality.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the requirement to auto-generate a unique UTE reference number and embed it in a pre-filled WhatsApp message when the customer clicks 'Payment Done', covering PaymentSection.tsx and whatsapp.ts.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend source files, describing the purpose and key details of each component, hook, and utility in the Luminia Group project.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS file defining OKLCH-based design tokens for light and dark themes, including colors for background, foreground, primary, sidebar, and chart variables.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point for the Luminia Group React app, mounting the app into a root div and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that composes all page sections in order—including the new PaymentSection—wrapped in a React Query provider with a dark luxury background.
frontend/src/components/AssuredToursSect: Scroll-animated section for the Assured Tours & Travels division, displaying a banner, image pair, six service cards, and a WhatsApp booking CTA button.
frontend/src/components/ComingSoonSectio: Section showcasing three upcoming Luminia brands (Gadgets, Moda Vestra, Velocity Vogue) as animated cards with a 'Launching Soon' badge and a WhatsApp notify button.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Premium dark footer displaying the Luminia logo, portfolio brand list, and contact links including email and WhatsApp, with a caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/components/GSTServicesSecti: Renders the GST Services section with animated header, banner image, and three clickable service cards (Registration, Filing, Consulting) that open WhatsApp with a pre-built booking message.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Full-screen hero section with a background image, Luminia Group logo, tagline, and a CTA button that smoothly scrolls to the Assured Tours section.
frontend/src/components/LuminiaCapturesS: Renders the Luminia Captures photography division section with scroll-animated header, banner image, image pair, and six service cards that trigger WhatsApp booking on click.
frontend/src/components/LuminiaTechLabsS: Renders the Luminia TechLabs division section with scroll-animated header, banner image, a two-column content layout with an image, and six technology service cards linked to WhatsApp booking.
frontend/src/components/ManifestoSection: Displays a centered manifesto quote section with a decorative gold aesthetic, scroll-fade animation, and a stats row showing subsidiaries count, ambition, and vision.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Fixed top navigation bar with scroll-aware background, desktop link buttons for all site sections, and a responsive mobile hamburger menu with smooth-scroll behavior.
frontend/src/components/PaymentSection.t: Renders a payment section with a two-step UPI/QR code flow: first a 'Proceed to Pay' button, then a QR code display, followed by a WhatsApp confirmation message with a generated UTE reference.
Displays a 'Coming Soon' full-screen placeholder page with the Luminia Group logo, animated fade-in, and decorative gold dividers.
frontend/src/components/SubsidiaryDetail: A modal overlay that shows detailed information (images, description, enquiry button) for a selected subsidiary, with keyboard navigation and scroll lock.
frontend/src/components/SubsidiaryGrid.t: Renders a grid of Luminia Group subsidiary cards with enquire buttons and opens a SubsidiaryDetails modal on card click.
frontend/src/components/WelcomePopup.tsx: A full-screen welcome splash screen with animated particle rain, the Luminia logo, and an 'Enter' button that dismisses it and sets a sessionStorage flag.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Placeholder module with no backend queries, as the site is a static corporate website.
frontend/src/hooks/useScrollAnimation.ts: Custom React hook that uses IntersectionObserver to track when an element enters the viewport, returning a ref and visibility boolean for scroll-triggered animations.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Cormorant Garamond font and Tailwind, defining CSS variables for the gold/obsidian luxury theme, scrollbar styles, and keyframe animations.
frontend/src/lib/whatsapp.ts: Utility module exporting the business WhatsApp number and helper functions to open WhatsApp with pre-filled messages for bookings, notifications, and payment confirmations.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining the luxury gold/obsidian color palette, Cormorant Garamond font family, custom shadows, zero border-radius defaults, and keyframe animations.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file recording schema version, existing implemented features with their IDs and requirements, used for build planning and change management.
